title: Waystone Crypts
description: Adds crypts that can contain a waystone.
body:
This mod adds adds crypts into Minecraft that contain waystones. If you are wondering where the mod logo was created, I used the help of blockbench which you can use as well for free!

This is a Fabric, Quilt, Forge, and Neoforge Mod


Report bugs here.


Features:

This is a mod which adds vanilla friendly crypts (currently only two variant(s)) in the game which can spawn randomly throughout cave systems in the overworld. These crypts have a 50% chance to contain waystones. Supports both the Wraith Waystones mod or the Waystones mod.
It is also should be compatible with any other structure mod. Make sure to leave a comment if it isn't so I can try and fix it!
No expansions planned for now, feel free to add your suggestions. 


Images:

Located in the gallery tab.
